title: Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks – Responsible Business Conduct) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
description: RBI issued comprehensive amendments to strengthen customer protection in financial product sales. The directions ban compulsory bundling of third-party products with banks' own offerings, mandate explicit customer consent, introduce full refund mechanisms for mis-selling, ban dark patterns in digital interfaces, and expand agent regulation scope. NBFCs are now allowed to distribute insurance products without prior RBI approval (subject to IRDAI authorization). These directions are effective from January 1, 2027.
